description: This file defines the MailjetEmailProvider class, which implements the EmailProvider interface for sending emails via Mailjet's API. It includes configuration handling, request building, and error handling logic for email transmission.

classes.name: MailjetEmailProvider
classes.description: Implements email sending functionality using Mailjet's API, utilizing provided notification properties and HTTP client.

methods.name: MailjetEmailProvider
methods.description: Constructor initializing with notification properties, object mapper, and optional HTTP client.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Sends an email using Mailjet API with given request details, recipient email, subject, and body text.
